(a) The department is created as an agency of this state.

(b) In addition to the other duties required of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles, the department shall administer and enforce:

(1) Subtitle A;

(2) Chapters 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) , 622 (Special Provisions and Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 623 (Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 642 (Identifying Markings on Commercial Motor Vehicles) , 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) , 645 (Unified Carrier Registration) , 646 (Motor Transportation Brokers) , and 648 (Foreign Commercial Motor Transportation) ; and

(3) Chapters 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) and 2302 (Salvage Vehicle Dealers) , Occupations Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.002 — Creation of Department; Duties

(a) The department is created as an agency of this state.

(b) In addition to the other duties required of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles, the department shall administer and enforce:

    (1) Subtitle A;

    (2) Chapters 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) , 622 (Special Provisions and Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 623 (Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 642 (Identifying Markings on Commercial Motor Vehicles) , 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) , 645 (Unified Carrier Registration) , 646 (Motor Transportation Brokers) , and 648 (Foreign Commercial Motor Transportation) ; and

    (3) Chapters 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) and 2302 (Salvage Vehicle Dealers) , Occupations Code.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 97, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department is created as an agency of this state.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In addition to the other duties required of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles, the department shall administer and enforce:

Chapters 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) , 622 (Special Provisions and Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 623 (Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) , 642 (Identifying Markings on Commercial Motor Vehicles) , 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) , 645 (Unified Carrier Registration) , 646 (Motor Transportation Brokers) , and 648 (Foreign Commercial Motor Transportation) ; and
Chapters 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) and 2302 (Salvage Vehicle Dealers) , Occupations Code.
